info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/share \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"nodeId":"string","allowSave":true,"allowCopy":true,"password":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"nodeId\":\"string\",\"allowSave\":true,\"allowCopy\":true,\"password\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/share", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get all shared node IDs for a base

200.description: Returns list of shared node IDs

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/share \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/share", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

get.description: Get a base share by node ID

200.description: Returns the base share for the specified node

post.description: Authenticate with password to access shared base

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/share/%7BshareId%7D/base/auth \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"password":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"password\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/share/%7BshareId%7D/base/auth", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Copy a shared base to a target space

spaceId.description: The target space ID to copy the base to

name.description: The name of the copied base

baseId.description: The target base ID to copy into. If provided, tables will be added to the existing base instead of creating a new one.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/share/%7BshareId%7D/base/copy \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"spaceId":"string","name":"string","withRecords":true,"baseId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"spaceId\":\"string\",\"name\":\"string\",\"withRecords\":true,\"baseId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/share/%7BshareId%7D/base/copy", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
